scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Require: sdp-anat Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1556186722 2 IN IP6 2001:e3:abcd:cafe:10:133:127:158 s=- c=IN IP4 10.133.127.142 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=group:ANAT 1 a=activetalker:1 m=audio 35474 RTP/SAVP 127 120 c=IN IP4 10.133.127.142 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:127 opus/48000/2 a=fmtp:127 maxaveragebitrate=20000;maxplaybackrate=16000;stereo=0;cbr=0;useinbandfec=1;usedtx=0;sprop-maxcapturerate=16000;sprop-stereo=0 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=maxptime:20 a=acfg:2 t=1 a=2 a=mid:1 a=crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:eQOwAQWpgnNT6s7rUWtJKZSSvUQpg8duBvT13FsZ a=minptime:20 m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 127 9 8 0 110 18 120 c=IN IP6 :: a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:127 opus/48000/2 a=rtpmap:110 G726-32/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=yes a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=mid:2 a=crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:K9ZGmjsAxYh7duZ9VAnUVbTABiVzQZmaYPbrqejZfX4SpQNug4RGiPNn9+mBYA==
